title: Sonnet 60 by William Shakespeare | line by line explanation in Hindi | Summary
description:
Sonnet 60 is one of the 154 sonnets written by the English playwright and poet William Shakespeare. It's a member of the Fair Youth sequence, in which the poet expresses his love towards a young beloved.
